titleImg.first: Translation of french texts in other languages

whoAmI.wholistOne: Hello one and all, my name is Rodolphe, I am a French translator and interpreter, and my work language are English and German to French. I am able to create translations from written as well audio-visual documents, and can perform continuous interpretation.
whoAmI.wholistTwo: My studies have helped me getting familiarized in various fields, such as law, sciences and cybersecurity. My own experience has also made me uniquely specialized in documents pertaining to autism.
whoAmI.wholistThree: During the course of an internship, I’ve also received acknowledgment in the professionalism of my translations in the audio-visual fields.
whoAmI.wholistFour: I have been passionate about translation ever since I discovered the profession, and each document will be rigorously treated and translated, so that it may meet your expectations, be they in terms of quality or when you need them most.

educations.educ2-H4: Université Catholique de l'Ouest - Bretagne Nord et Angers
educations.educ2-P: Licence Langues Etrangères Appliquées, mineure Langue et Culture

contactSection.contactTitle: Do you have a new project to translate ?

tradServices.textList-One: Translating is not only an interpretation of a sentence from one language to another, but also the intimate understanding of the two cultures in question, as in the source and the target languages.
tradServices.textList-Two: Moreover, and much like a lawyer, a translator can also specialize; if a lawyer will work in the Family Court, a translator can target specific fields, such as medicine, the law, hard sciences, etc.

translationInterpretation.translationServiceText: Here are the services proposed for a translation
translationInterpretation.personnalDocumentText: Translation of lettres manuscrites ou dactylographiées, témoignages...
translationInterpretation.officialDocumentText: Translation of official documents ou certification de documents déjà traduits : Permis de conduire, certificat de mariage...
translationInterpretation.DocumentText: Translation of documents commerciaux : plaquettes, guides, tarifs, déclaration de douanes, documents de transports, commandes, factures...
translationInterpretation.interpretationServiceText: Here are the services proposed for an interpretation
translationInterpretation.ConsecutiveSiteText: Consecutive interpreting (each interlocutor waiting for the end of the translation in progress to continue), carried out at the meeting location. Travel costs counted in addition to the duration of the service.
translationInterpretation.ConsecutivePhoneText: Consecutive interpreting (each interlocutor waiting for the end of the translation in progress to continue), carried out at the meeting location. Communication costs counted in addition to the duration of the service.
